pi_items.source: Confirmed in task.json description (line 5), setup_task.sh (lines 99-100), and export_result.sh (line 10)
Confirmed in task.json description (line 5 'Login: user ga'), setup_task.sh (line 103 'su - ga'), and home directory creation at /home/ga
Confirmed in verifier.py line 22 (PASS_THRESHOLD = 100) and total possible scoring: Report validity (20) + Port match (40) + Token match (40) = 100 points

privileged_info_summary: The task is a distroless Docker debugging challenge where agents must identify a listening TCP port (randomly generated between 8000-9000) and extract the AUTH_TOKEN environment variable (randomly generated from SHA256 hash of timestamp) from the container 'acme-blackbox' without shell access. The report must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/blackbox_report.json. Login credentials are user 'ga' with password 'password123'. Passing requires all 100 points: valid JSON report (20 pts), correct port identification (40 pts), and correct auth token extraction (40 pts). All data values are synthetic and randomly generated at runtime.
